claim: SNIRH (snirh.apambiente.pt), managed by APA, is the primary open-access data source for Algarve river flows, reservoir levels, and groundwater monitoring — aggregating data from 1,500 stations across 10+ monitoring networks.
stance_target: SNIRH as the core computational data source for water availability in the territorial intelligence layer
quoted_support: SNIRH, now managed by the APA, brings together all data from more than 10 monitoring networks, 1500 stations and 250 associated parameters at time intervals ranging from minute to year.
numbers: time intervals from minute to year
